_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: the binding of proto-oncogene c-Raf and phospho-MEK1/2 to KSR1 was reduced after introducing active Merlin-S518A, but not Merlin-S518D
details: Demonstrated that active Merlin-S518A reduces binding of c-Raf and phospho-MEK1/2 to KSR1, while Merlin-S518D does not affect this binding
